languages.text: Благодарные служители Бога-Машины почитали Вольного Торговца как свят{mf|ого|ую} сподвижни{mf|ка|цу}, включив {mf|его|ее} имя в техна-лингву. Вскоре оно стало нарицательным, войдя в обиход среди техножрецов Простора в значении "компетентный мирянин" и вызвав множество теологических прений. В результате многих циклов богословских споров и разбирательств, истоки слова обнаружились среди генеторов Сектора Бионика судна Вольного Торговца и практику объявили схизмой, явившейся в результате гордыни техножрецов, посмевших исказить священный язык Омниссии. Имя было приказано исторгнуть из благих кодировок техна-лингвы, но годы спустя оно все еще продолжало звучать среди бинарных шепотов жрецов Простора.

The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary, enshrining {mf|his|her} name in the Lingua-Technis. Before long, it entered common parlance among the Expanse's Tech-Priests, becoming a byword for "capable layperson" and igniting a firestorm of theological controversy. After cycles of intense debate and investigation, the term was traced back to the Genetors of the Sector Bionica on the Rogue Trader's vessel. The practice was condemned as blasphemous, born of the Tech-Priests' hubris in daring to distort the sacred language of the Omnissiah. The name was ordered purged from the blessed codices of the Lingua-Technis, yet, years later, it still echoed within the binharic whispers of the Expanse's priesthood.

traits.locale_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary, enshrining {mf|his|her} name within the Lingua-Technis. Before long, it passed into common parlance among the Expanse's Tech-Priests, meaning a "capable layperson" and igniting a firestorm of theological controversy. After cycles of intense debate and investigation, the term was traced back to the Genetors of the Sector Bionica aboard the Rogue Trader's vessel. The practice was condemned as blasphemous, born of the Tech-Priests' hubris in daring to distort the sacred language of the Omnissiah. The name was ordered purged from the blessed codices of the Lingua-Technis, yet years later, it still echoed within the binharic whispers of the Expanse's priesthood.

The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary, enshrining {mf|his|her} name in the Lingua-Technis. Before long, it entered common parlance among the Expanse's Tech-Priests, becoming a byword for "capable layperson" and igniting a firestorm of theological controversy. After cycles of intense debate and investigation, the term was traced back to the Genetors of the Sector Bionica on the Rogue Trader's vessel. The practice was condemned as blasphemous, born of the Tech-Priests' hubris in daring to distort the sacred language of the Omnissiah. The name was ordered purged from the blessed codices of the Lingua-Technis, yet, years later, it still echoed within the binharic whispers of the Expanse's priesthood.

The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

languages.text: 機械神の感謝に満ちたしもべたちは、ローグトレーダーを聖なる信徒として崇め、{mf|彼|彼女}の名を彼らのビナリック崇拝祈祷に加えた。強化器を組み合わせて作られた偶像を据えた、ローグトレーダーを祀る祠が、エクスパンス全土の数多の生産ラインに現れ始めた。これは一連の神学論争を引き起こし、ついにその慣行は分裂として宣告されるに至った。それ以降も、秘密の祠はあちらこちらに湧き続けたのだった。
languages.original_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

traits.locale_text: しかし、その船内での機械神殿の台頭により、その伝説は王朝から奪われた。この旗艦は、拒否できない屈辱的な取引で、認知艦隊によってローグトレーダーから没収された。
機械神の感謝に満ちたしもべたちは、ローグトレーダーを聖なる信徒として崇め、{mf|彼|彼女}の名を彼らのビナリック崇拝祈祷に加えた。強化器を組み合わせて作られた偶像を据えた、ローグトレーダーを祀る祠が、エクスパンス全土の数多の生産ラインに現れ始めた。これは一連の神学論争を引き起こし、ついにその慣行は分裂として宣告されるに至った。それ以降も、秘密の祠はあちらこちらに湧き続けたのだった。

languages.text: 万机之神的仆从们感激地将行商浪人尊为神圣信徒，并将{mf|他|她}的名字编入他们的二进制敬拜祷文。扩区的许多生产线上开始出现供奉行商浪人的神龛，供奉着由植入物拼装而成的雕像。这引发了一系列神学争议，最终这种做法被定性为宗教分裂。即便如此，秘密神龛仍在各处不断出现。
languages.original_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

traits.locale_text: 万机之神的仆从们感激地将行商浪人尊为神圣信徒，并将{mf|他|她}的名字编入他们的二进制敬拜祷文。扩区的许多生产线上开始出现供奉行商浪人的神龛，供奉着由植入物拼装而成的雕像。这引发了一系列神学争议，最终这种做法被定性为宗教分裂。即便如此，秘密神龛仍在各处不断出现。

languages.text: Reconnaissants, les serviteurs du Dieu-machine vénérèrent {mf|le libre-marchand,|la libre-marchande,} qu'ils considéraient désormais comme {mf|disciple sacré|disciple sacrée}, et ajoutèrent son nom à leurs litanies de culte binhaires. Des autels dédiés {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}, abritant des idoles façonnées à partir d'augmentations diverses et variées, firent leur apparition dans de nombreuses lignes de production des Étendues. Cette pratique entraîna une série de débats théologiques, qui eux-mêmes donnèrent lieu à un véritable schisme. Même après tant de dissensions, des sanctuaires secrets continuèrent à fleurir ici et là.
languages.original_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

traits.locale_text: Reconnaissants, les serviteurs du Dieu-machine vénérèrent {mf|le libre-marchand,|la libre-marchande,} qu'ils considéraient désormais comme {mf|disciple sacré|disciple sacrée}, et ajoutèrent son nom à leurs litanies de culte binhaires. Des autels dédiés {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}, abritant des idoles façonnées à partir d'augmentations diverses et variées, firent leur apparition dans de nombreuses lignes de production des Étendues. Cette pratique entraîna une série de débats théologiques, qui eux-mêmes donnèrent lieu à un véritable schisme. Même après tant de dissensions, des sanctuaires secrets continuèrent à fleurir ici et là.

Cependant, l'influence grandissante de l'Adeptus Mechanicus à bord du vaisseau arracha la légende des mains de la dynastie. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} fut {mf|contraint|contrainte} d'accepter un accord humiliant qui {mf|le|la} priva du vaisseau amiral, confisqué par la Flotte de la Connaissance.

languages.text: Los agradecidos siervos del Dios Máquina canonizaron {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente y añadieron su nombre a su devocionario de letanías binarias. Se erigieron altares en honor {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente en numerosas cadenas de fabricación de toda la Extensión, construidos a base de piezas de aumentos. Aquello dio lugar a una serie de debates teológicos hasta que finalmente la práctica se consideró cismática. Pese a ello, continuaron apareciendo santuarios secretos aquí y allá.
languages.original_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

Aquello dio lugar a una serie de debates teológicos hasta que finalmente la práctica se consideró cismática. Pese a ello, continuaron apareciendo santuarios secretos aquí y allá.

languages.text: Makine Tanrı'nın minnettar hizmetkârları, Hür Tacir'e kutsal bir mürit olarak saygı duydu ve adını ibadetlerinin ikilidil ilahilerine ekledi. Enginlik'teki pek çok üretim hattında, ogmentlerden bir araya getirilmiş putların bulunduğu Hür Tacir türbeleri belirmeye başladı. Bu durum, nihayetinde uygulamanın kâfirlik olarak ilan edilmesine kadar süren bir dizi teolojik tartışmayı ateşledi. Ondan sonra bile orada burada gizli türbeler ortaya çıkmaya devam etti.
languages.original_text: The grateful servants of the Machine God revered the Rogue Trader as a holy votary and added {mf|his|her} name to their binharic litanies of worship. Shrines to the Rogue Trader, featuring idols assembled from augments, began to appear in many production lines across the Expanse. This sparked a series of theological debates until the practice was ultimately declared a schism. Even after that, secret shrines continued to spring up here and there.

languages.text: Die dankbaren Diener des Maschinengottes verehrten {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} als {mf|heiligen Geweihten|heilige Geweihte} und nahmen {mf|seinen|ihren} Namen in die binhärischen Litaneien der Verehrung auf. In vielen Produktionslinien der gesamten Ausdehnung tauchten nun mit aus Augmentationen erstellten Götzen versehene Schreine für {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} auf. Dies führte zu einer Reihe theologischer Debatten, bis die Praxis schließlich zum Schisma erklärt wurde. Allerdings tauchten auch danach immer wieder geheime Schreine auf.
